summary: #101 Per-agent cost breakdown: AgentCostBreakdown component with horizontal bars, agent colors, dollar amounts and percentages. getCostReport() reads costs.json locally + GitHub API fallback for production.

#98 Global search/filter: IssuesFilter and DecisionFilter client components with real-time filtering, ?q= URL sync, / keyboard shortcut, and clear button. Issues page filters by title; Logs page filters decisions by summary+project.
#117 Live Sessions auto-refresh: 15s poll, green pulse dot, Updated Xs ago counter, error badge with stale data retention, tab blur pause/resume.
#119 Loop log pagination: 50/page with Older/Newer buttons, Redis cap 200, API offset+limit params, totalErrors across all pages in error badge.

#120 Agent last-task cards: Redis agent:last-task:<type> key (24h TTL) written on completed heartbeat, merged into /api/agents, shown on Teams page NodeCard with task label, relative time, and issue chip.

#118 Monthly Spend metric card: reads costs.json mtdSpend, shows dollar value + budget %, DollarSign MetricCard in 5-col grid. Also added PRICING constants, formatSpend(), budgetPct() to lib/costs.ts.

Product launched: Expo/React Native iOS app for real-time gym form analysis. Single repo wkliwk/gym-form-coach, Project board 10. 5 seed issues created: Expo setup, camera+pose estimation, squat form module, session summary, deadlift+pushup modules.

Used blank-typescript Expo template (not tabs) as minimal base. iOS deploymentTarget=14.0 for iPhone 12+ floor. ESLint with @typescript-eslint enforces no-explicit-any. No EAS config yet, no camera packages yet — those are issue #2.

Issue #4 done: Session summary screen + local history. SharedTypes (Exercise, FormFlag, SessionRecord), AsyncStorage persistence, Summary screen with delta badges, History screen with FlatList. PR #7.

Camera/pose approach: expo-camera CameraView + periodic takePictureAsync snapshots decoded via decodeJpeg into TF.js MoveNet SINGLEPOSE_LIGHTNING. cameraWithTensors HOC from tfjs-react-native@1.0.0 not usable — requires old expo-camera Camera class removed in v55. Achieves ~5fps for form analysis. Upgrade path: react-native-vision-camera frame processors for 15-30fps post-MVP.

Issue #3 done: Squat form analyser — 4-phase state machine rep detector, knee angle tracking, 3 form flags (knees_caving, depth_too_shallow, forward_lean), audio cues via expo-speech, safety banner, camera guide. PR #9.
Issue #5 done: Deadlift + push-up form modules. All 3 MVP exercises now have form analysers. Complete MVP exercise coverage. PR #10.

Issue #12 done: Navigation stack + exercise picker. React Navigation bottom tabs (Train/History) + native stack (Home→Session→Summary). Home screen with 3 exercise cards. Session accepts exerciseType param. PR #17.
#243 Added Batch Fill nav link to DashboardNav — one-line fix, feature was fully built but unreachable
#244 Guided Fill Finish now triggers mark-as-complete + FormCompleteOverlay via onFinish prop
#247 Dashboard empty state: new /api/forms/sample endpoint + DashboardEmptyState component, no quota increment
#245 Template share OG/Twitter metadata — per-page generateMetadata replaces layout fallback, must always include image+desc
#246 Jump-to-unfilled: toolbar button + Alt+N/] keyboard shortcut + field-highlight-pulse CSS animation in FormViewer
#253 Delete form: quota decrement + template revocation + toast. FormTemplate.sourceFormId is not a FK — must revoke manually
#253 Delete form: quota decrement + template revocation + toast. FormTemplate.sourceFormId is not a FK — must revoke manually
#257 Quota email existed but fired for Pro users — fixed by adding isProUser() guard in upload route

Issue #13 done: Wired form analysis + audio cues into Session screen. useRepDetector processes poses per-frame, CueBanner delivers audio+visual cues, CameraGuide shown before start, SafetyBanner component replaces inline. End Session passes real accumulated stats. PR #18.

Issue #15: generated branded dumbbell icon (1024x1024, #1A1A2E bg, #00E5FF accent) and splash screen using Python PIL; added 3-slide swipeable onboarding (AsyncStorage flag, Skip on every screen); updated app.json for dark splash; App.tsx reads flag on launch and gates onboarding.
Issue #14 done: EAS Build config — 3 profiles (dev/preview/prod), buildNumber in app.json, .easignore. PR #20.
Issue #15 done: Branded splash screen, app icon (dumbbell), 3-slide onboarding with AsyncStorage first-launch flag. PR #19.
Phase 2 complete: all issues #11-#16 done. Navigation, form analysis wiring, EAS build, polish, QA. Zero dead code. App is code-complete for TestFlight.

Phase 3 planned: 4 issues + epic. Priority order: #23 CueBanner fix (S, dev), #24 Sentry crash reporting (M, dev), #22 first EAS build + TestFlight upload (M, ops — requires Ricky for Apple creds), #25 vision-camera fps upgrade (L, dev). Focus is shipping to beta testers fastest: fix visible bugs, add observability, then build and distribute, then improve performance.
Issue #23 done: Fixed CueBanner overlap — dynamic positioning using Dimensions (18% screen height, min 140px). PR #26.
Issue #24 done: Sentry crash reporting + analytics breadcrumbs (trackSessionStart/End, trackExerciseSelected). PR #27.
Issue #25 done: Upgraded to react-native-vision-camera. 100ms interval with skip-if-busy pattern. Target 10-15fps (was 5fps). Requires dev client build. PR #28.
